purpose: Present solutions, recommendations, or actionable steps — what can be done, by whom, and what stands in the way.
writingRules: Each solution must include who would implement it and what it would cost
Include both short-term fixes and long-term structural solutions
Show examples where similar solutions have worked elsewhere
Do not recommend solutions that lack evidence of feasibility
seoRules: Use HowTo schema for step-by-step solutions
Solution headings should target question-based keywords
Cost data should use schema.org MonetaryAmount markup
